entry.title: Period Sex at a Wayne Gala
entry.summary:
Author: velvet_alchemist

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,646Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 49

Summary: I’m sorry the name is lowkey questionable but I wanted to make sure yall know what this is. Warning: probably cringe but my reader asked for it and I am a dutiful writer for my loyal royal subjects. Anyway: you get absolutely railed by Jason and Roy but also you got your period early whoopsie

entry.title: A Different Life With You
entry.summary:
Author: veena_the_aloo

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,552Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 154

Summary: Jason doesn't wanna die. He really doesn't. He prays to whatever god that will listen to not let him die again.Whatever god did seem to be listening seemed to have given pity. Because when he wakes, he wakes up ten years older, in a house he doesn't recognize, married to a woman he doesn't know and with kids he's never seen. He's in another man's body. (Can be read as Reader or OC since FMC is never directly referred to by name or described)

entry.title: Have you found it yet?
entry.summary:
Author: lixsznshine

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,283Chapters: 4/27Kudos: 26

Summary: There were many reasons to be sad in Gotham. First of all, because you have the misfortune of living in Gotham. In close second, the endless threat of whatever supercriminal that had decided today was the day the world ends. Third, it stinks. There were many reasons to hate your life if you lived in Gotham. You could breathe the wrong way and get stabbed, or god forbid you decide to carry some cash on you - you’d practically be walking into your own grave at that point. It seems you’ve failed at everything that you’ve tried in your life, including finding a reason to explain your never-ending sadness.

  • Graphic Depictions Of Violence

entry.title: The trees will fall (but i will keep standing by you)
entry.summary:
Author: Morningstar_knight

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,150Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 40

Summary: District 7. The Lumber District. It hurts when you are reaped. It hurts being taken from your family. It hurts seeing your fellow Tribute, Jason Todd, and knowing you two probably won’t survive this years Hunger Games. (No promises on when next chapter is, I'll have to re-edit and beta read each one. Start from the beginning if you're an old reader, because I re-edited 1 through 8. And if you're a new reader... enoy!)

entry.title: Adoration
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,294Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 98

Summary: Jason Todd has never been subtle about his obsession with your breasts—and he’s never tried to be. What begins as a simple, everyday moment after a shower turns into a slow, indulgent night of devotion, where Jason takes his time worshipping you with his hands and mouth.

entry.title: My Bad Habit (Jason Todd)
entry.summary:
Author: kiriqo

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,319Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 2

Summary: You worked at a dog kennel for a few years so of course you had a knick for taking in strays and fixing broken things. So, when a mysterious man who’s more layered than an onion appears…you simply can’t help yourself.

entry.title: The Odd Tea Shop in Crime Alley
entry.summary:
Author: nocteris

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,950Chapters: 7/25Kudos: 241

Summary: Across the street from Jason’s apartment in Park Row, a budding sign of hope caught his eye. A simple signage: Opening Soon! Tea Brews and Books. Only, he almost fistfights the snarky tea shop owner at a book sale. Then, rescues her from a mugger or three as Red Hood. Uncoincidentally, his family gets interested in the tea shop and plagues Jason with their existence both mask-on and mask-off. Coincidentally, said tea shop owner has the biggest crush on Red Hood. Now, how the hell was Jason supposed to compete with himself?

entry.title: Bloodlust & Bare Minimums (Jason Todd x vampire! Reader)
entry.summary:
Author: blehwhocares03

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,372Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Jason Todd always took down his target; he didn't care about their backstory; he just knew he had to take down every vampire in Gotham. But a shut-in vampire changes that the second she surrenders instead of fighting him. He lets her go only to meet each other again in an unexpected turn of events. She turned his world upside down in the best way possible. Now, he's torn between what he wants and his obligations.

entry.title: The lock you checked three times
entry.summary:
Author: Angelina_2206

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,349Chapters: 32/32Kudos: 199

Summary: Jason Todd is a problem. He wears a leather jacket, knuckles taped and an attitude that rots like Gotham. He gets in fights and smokes behind the gym, and teachers are torn between expelling him and begging him to apply to Ivy Leagues. You're the transfer from Metropolis. You're broke and live in a basement apartment. You work two jobs and don't talk about why you left your old school. You made a mistake, and Jason stopped talking to you. Except at night, because thats when Red hood watches you. (Tags updates throughout each posts)

entry.title: The House hunger built
entry.summary:
Author: FearTheHime

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,467Chapters: 30/?Kudos: 855

Summary: "Of course I eat people, I mean...It's not something I would broadcast since it's...well Gotham and they began to make a phad about it because the citizens are brilliantly...stupid."Bodies are piling up, whatever is left. Families; different backgrounds, different ethnics, religions, looks are being eaten and whatever is left into a master piece. Some sort of art with the remains and everyone was losing time and leads to find out who has been feasting upon Gotham citizens. Jason however, knew of a Cannibal that he totally never mentioned to Bruce. It's not Jason's fault he died before revealing his darkest discovery and that discovery is in the form of a boy he had left behind. [M/N] [L/N]; Mortitan, brilliant, a chef of his own making and conisear of flesh.All Jason needed to do is sweeten the deal in a way that drives all people, after all at the end of the day {M/N] is human after all."Besides..it's people...they are literally born every day..so who cares if a few of them...just disapear once in a while?"

entry.summary:

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,472Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 29

Summary: One blind woman meets an rather strange man who chased off some would be muggers. He's a bit awkward and a little harsh but they strike up an unlikely bond. Oh, and also he's Red Hood.

entry.title: Stray Knights and Cracked Armor
entry.summary:
Author: daizedndconfused

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,082Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 15

Summary: Gotham had been going to shit for a while. Desperate not to get caught in the cross-fire, you take a shortcut after work and end up in front of a rather wounded Arkham Knight. Staring straight into the barrel of his gun. He is beaten and bruised, and couldn't fire the gun if he tried. The Knight has been helping the Scarecrow in his latest scheme to bring Gotham to it's knees, but it seems to have gone wrong. You find him after a brutal encounter with the Bat and for some reason, some silly, stupid reason, you take him back to your apartment like a stray dog off the street. And yet, there may be more to this criminal than meets the eye. The same can certainly be said about yourself.
